sections.paragraph:
f. (from the root יָדָה Hiph.)-

(1) confession, Jos 7:19 Ezr 10:11.

(2) thanksgiving, Psal. 26:7 42:5 . זָבַה תֹּודָה to offer praise to God (for a sacrifice) Psa 50:14, 23 Psa 50:23 107:22 116:17 (where the phrase is not to be taken as though proper sacrifices were spoken of). זֶבַח תֹּודָה Lev 22:29, זֶבַח תֹּודַת הַשְּׁלָמִים Lev 7:13, 15 comp. 12 , and ellipt. תֹּודָה a sacrifice of thanks-giving, Psa 56:13.

(3) a choir of givers of thanks, praising God, Neh 12:31, 38 Neh 12:38, 40 Neh 12:40.
